enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his weekend in Boulder, which he spent mostly working on his website via drag-and-drop. He briefly mentions visiting his mom, getting weed from his roommate, listening to Young Turks, and starting a book called 'In Defense of Women' by Mencken. He reflects on his website project growing larger than planned but stays optimistic.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Doesn't mind it growing bigger than planned because he's still young and it'll be cool when done
Found some things interesting but thought he said a lot of crazy things too
